# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"

services:
- name: service1
  url: http://service1.example.com

- name: service2
  url: http://service2.example.com

upstreams:
- name: upstream1
  targets:
  - target: http://service1.example.com
    weight: 50
  - target: http://service3.example.com
    weight: 50

routes:
- name: route-service1
  paths:
  - /api/service1/
  service:
    name: service1
    path_handling: v1

- name: route-service2
  paths:
  - /api/service2/
  service:
    name: service2
    path_handling: v1

- name: route-upstream1
  paths:
  - /api/upstream1/
  service:
    name: upstream1
    path_handling: v1
